_comment: E2E pool config + credentials. `make test-accounts` populates pool.json (gitignored) by spawning qxp-web and driving its RPC chain (add_account -> set_config_from_qr -> configure -> get_config) -- the daemon handles the chatmail protocol, not the script. This file is the committed template. The iOS suite (qxp-ios/qxpUITests) reads the same pool.json format.
